description: Style Notelotto's interpretation of the sober flip flop - just right to wear with a pair of  jeans and a casual shirt. The colour, texture and styling in this piece doesn't scream vacation while offering you the smooth comfort of thong strap flip flops in your feet.Product DetailsBlack thong style straps with branding on the strapsTough, textured footbed with green thread detail and printTPU outsole with multidirectional lugs and brandingMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
